title: MultiIndex slicing with `xs` drops the level — is this documented?
body: `df.xs('A', level='outer')` returns a DataFrame with the outer level dropped from the index. I expected the level to be retained as a single-value level. Is the drop documented somewhere? `df.loc['A']` does the same thing.

comments.body: Pass `drop_level=False` to `xs` to keep the level. The default is to drop, which is mentioned briefly in the user guide but not in the API docstring. PR welcome to copy the user-guide note into the `xs` docstring.
